creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #69)
> I can't find the same page for 018, though.
Those libraries, however, are in the distfile, hence I asked.  Anyway, I'd leave it at your discretion.  Personally I'd go the first version which had these files, but if you prefer to follow official documentation and 024, I won't object.
